heading: Death or incapacity of breeder
label: 2424 Death or incapacity of breeder
text: Legal representatives of deceased breeders and of those under legal incapacity may make application for plant variety protection upon compliance with the requirements and on the same terms and conditions applicable to the breeder or the successor in interest of the breeder.
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “the successor in interest of the breeder” for “his successor in interest”.Pub. L. 103–349
Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective 180 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 103–349section 15 of Pub. L. 103–349section 2401 of this titleOct. 6, 1994
